pi_items.source: Task description requirements and export_result.sh script path verification.
Task description requirements and export_result.sh script path verification.
Task description requirements and confirmed via web search for the standard stimulus duration in George Sperling's 1960 experiment (50ms).
Task description requirements specifying the tone should start immediately upon the offset of the 0.05s visual grid.

privileged_info_summary: The required experiment file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/sperling_task.psyexp and the conditions file path is /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/sperling_conditions.csv, as dictated by the environment's task instructions and export script. The required stimulus duration (0.05s) matches George Sperling's original 1960 partial report paradigm (50ms). The required sound start time is verified to be 0.05s, which properly aligns with the immediate offset of the visual stimulus.
